summary.es: Annie rework: Tibbers más fuerte, Molten Shield rediseñado
summary.en: Annie rework: stronger Tibbers, Molten Shield redesigned

detail.es: Vida por nivel: 105→96. Armadura por nivel: 3.9→3.5. Molten Shield: nuevo escudo para Annie y Tibbers (50/110/170/230+40%AP) y speed decay (30/35/40/45%). Tibbers duración: 30s→20s. Tibbers AD: 50/75/100+20%AP→70/100/130+20%AP. Tibbers: nuevo salto a los 2s con 120/170/220+40%AP.
detail.en: Health per level: 105→96. Armor per level: 3.9→3.5. Molten Shield: new shield for Annie and Tibbers (50/110/170/230+40%AP) with movement speed decay (30/35/40/45%). Tibbers duration: 30s→20s. Tibbers AD: 50/75/100+20%AP→70/100/130+20%AP. Tibbers: new pounce at 2s dealing 120/170/220+40%AP.

summary.es: Caitlyn: Yordle Snap Trap recarga más rápido
summary.en: Caitlyn: Yordle Snap Trap charges faster

detail.es: Yordle Snap Trap tiempo de carga: 30/24/18/12s→27/22/17/12s.

summary.es: Graves: más daño en End of the Line y Collateral Damage
summary.en: Graves: more damage in End of the Line and Collateral Damage

detail.es: End of the Line bonus AD: 70/100/130/160%→80/110/140/170%. Collateral Damage daño base: 275/425/575→300/450/600.
detail.en: End of the Line bonus AD: 70/100/130/160%→80/110/140/170%. Collateral Damage base damage: 275/425/575→300/450/600.

summary.es: Gwen: Snip Snip a monstruos y Hallowed Mist mejorados
summary.en: Gwen: Snip Snip monster damage and Hallowed Mist improved

detail.es: Snip Snip daño a monstruos: nuevo 80%. Hallowed Mist CD: 20/18/16/14s→17/16/15/14s. Armadura/MR: 11/14/17/20→14/16/18/20.
detail.en: Snip Snip monster damage ratio: 80% (new). Hallowed Mist CD: 20/18/16/14s→17/16/15/14s. Armor/MR: 11/14/17/20→14/16/18/20.

summary.es: Lee Sin: más daño en Sonic Wave y Resonating Strike
summary.en: Lee Sin: more damage in Sonic Wave and Resonating Strike

detail.es: Sonic Wave AD: 100%→105%. Resonating Strike bonus: 100-200%→105-210%.
detail.en: Sonic Wave AD ratio: 100%→105%. Resonating Strike bonus: 100-200%→105-210%.

summary.es: Leona: más ataque base y daño de Solar Flare
summary.en: Leona: more base attack and Solar Flare damage

detail.es: Ataque base: 58→62. Ataque por nivel: 1.7→3. Solar Flare daño: 100/175/250→150/225/300.
detail.en: Base attack: 58→62. Attack per level: 1.7→3. Solar Flare base damage: 100/175/250→150/225/300.

summary.es: Nilah: más armadura base y daño de Formless Blade a monstruos
summary.en: Nilah: more base armor and Formless Blade monster damage

detail.es: Armadura base: 34→37. Vida regen base: 6→10. Formless Blade daño a monstruos: nuevo 60%.
detail.en: Base armor: 34→37. Base health regen: 6→10. Formless Blade monster damage ratio: 60% (new).

summary.es: Olaf nerfado: menos daño en Undertow y Reckless Swing
summary.en: Olaf nerfed: less Undertow and Reckless Swing damage

summary.es: Ornn nerfado continuamente: menos stats y daño
summary.en: Ornn nerfed continuously: less stats and damage

detail.es: Ataque base: 62→58. Vida por nivel: 128→112. Bellows Breath daño: 13/14/15/16% vida máxima→10/11/12/13%. Searing Charge bonus: 50%→40% armadura/MR.
detail.en: Base attack: 62→58. Health per level: 128→112. Bellows Breath damage: 13/14/15/16% max health→10/11/12/13%. Searing Charge bonus: 50%→40% armor/MR.

summary.es: Rakan nerfado: menos vida y escudo de Battle Dance
summary.en: Rakan nerfed: less health and Battle Dance shield

detail.es: Vida base: 570→540. Battle Dance escudo base: 45/80/115/150→35/70/105/140.
detail.en: Base health: 570→540. Battle Dance base shield: 45/80/115/150→35/70/105/140.

summary.es: Rammus: Rolling Armordillo más lento, Defensive Ball Curl reducido
summary.en: Rammus: Rolling Armordillo slower, Defensive Ball Curl reduced

detail.es: Rolling Armordillo MS: 60+90/14×(Level-1)→35+Level×2. Defensive Ball Curl armadura: 60/65/70/75%→55/60/65/70%.
detail.en: Rolling Armordillo movement speed: 60+90/14×(Level-1)→35+Level×2. Defensive Ball Curl armor: 60/65/70/75%→55/60/65/70%.

summary.es: Samira: más daño de Flair y Blade Whirl más rápido
summary.en: Samira: more Flair damage and faster Blade Whirl

summary.es: Volibear: más curación y daño a monstruos en Frenzied Maul
summary.en: Volibear: more healing and monster damage in Frenzied Maul

detail.es: Frenzied Maul curación: 10/20/30/40→20/30/40/50. Daño a monstruos: nuevo 80%.
detail.en: Frenzied Maul health regen: 10/20/30/40→20/30/40/50. Monster damage ratio: 80% (new).

summary.es: Zoe nerfada: menos daño en Paddle Star y Sleepy Trouble Bubble
summary.en: Zoe nerfed: less damage in Paddle Star and Sleepy Trouble Bubble

summary.es: Boots of Mana: menos AP y regen de maná
summary.en: Boots of Mana: less AP and mana regen

summary.es: Plated Steelcaps: menos reducción de daño físico
summary.en: Plated Steelcaps: less physical damage reduction
